200.description: Agent registered and derived token issued

get.summary: Discover authenticated Hades protocol capabilities
get.description: Requires an authenticated Hades agent token. `persephone_agent_queue_v1` advertises protocol support only; it is not a per-agent permission to mutate data.

get.summary: List immutable project Logbook entries
get.description: Returns authorized entries newest first. Technical payload remains an entry detail, not a free-text search index.

200.description: Cursor page of project-scoped Logbook entries

post.summary: Append one immutable project Logbook entry
post.description: Requires the explicit authenticated-agent capability `write_project_logbook`; no legacy grant or role fallback authorizes this operation. An idempotent replay returns the original entry.

503.description: Domain mutation completed but its required Logbook record remains a durable degraded obligation

get.summary: Read one immutable project Logbook entry
List bounded wiki page summaries for a linked workspace

post.summary: Create or revise a needs-verification wiki draft

201.description: New wiki draft created with needs_verification status

get.summary: Read one wiki page and its current revision

post.summary: Verify a wiki revision against bounded code evidence

evidence_refs.description: Every evidence reference carries 1-8 agent-authored claim mappings; at most 80 claims are allowed across the complete request.

403.description: The agent is not granted verify_project_wiki for this project

error.message: The verify_project_wiki capability is not enabled for this Hades agent.

422.description: Chunk or import state failed validation

422.description: Manifest or chunk set is incomplete

200.description: Work item lease token and current item payload

Complete a claimed work item with local agent output and optional memory entry
Mark a claimed work item as failed with a bounded diagnostic message

200.description: Local workspace linked for this plugin device

Unauthorized.description: Missing, expired, or invalid bearer token

Forbidden.description: Authenticated agent is not allowed to perform this action

error.message: Agent is not allowed to access this workspace.

value.message: The workspace binding id field is required.

workspace_binding_id: The workspace binding id field is required.

value.message: Job deadline expired before local confirmation.

entries.summary: Use the backend as authoritative shared memory.

safeInteger.$comment: JSON Schema's mathematical integer model accepts a parsed lexical 1.0. Contract decoders MUST reject every lexical float with float_not_allowed before schema validation; see golden/raw_wire_negative_vectors.

safePath.$comment: JSON Schema enforces normalized POSIX path shape. UTF-8 byte length and Unicode NFC are mandatory application-boundary checks because maxLength counts code points and JSON Schema cannot assert NFC.

persephone_agent_queue_v1.description: Protocol support advertisement, not a mutating-task permission.

capability_names.description: Effective names granted to this agent. Wiki verification is allowed only when verify_project_wiki is present; existing tokens are not escalated automatically.

memory_entry.description: Optional shared-memory proposal payload derived from local agent work

sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 of the recursively key-sorted compact JSON artifact, preserving list order, Unicode, slashes, and zero fractions.

target_workspace_binding_id.description: Required and non-null for workspace-bound capabilities

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp after which the message must be rejected

payload.description: Canonical UTF-8 JSON must not exceed 65536 bytes

id.description: Safe project-relative path: no absolute, drive, empty, dot, or dot-dot segments.

summary.description: Plain-language text; raw HTML tags are rejected, while Markdown is allowed.

narrative_markdown.description: Optional Markdown narrative; raw HTML tags are rejected.

payload.description: Bounded structured technical facts; not indexed by free-text search.

summary.description: Plain-language text; raw HTML tags are rejected, while Markdown is allowed.

narrative_markdown.description: Optional Markdown narrative; raw HTML tags are rejected.
